# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

plugins:
  - name: cors
    service: my_service
    config:
      origins: "http://example.com, http://another-example.com"
      methods: "GET, POST, OPTIONS"
      headers: "Content-Type, Authorization, X-Requested-With"
      exposed_headers: "X-Total-Count"
      credentials: true
  
  - name: cors
    route: my_route
    config:
      origins: "http://example.com"
      methods: "GET, POST"
      headers: "Content-Type"
      exposed_headers: "X-My-Custom-Header"
      credentials: false

  - name: key-auth
    service: my_service
    config:
      key_names: "apikey"
      hide_credentials: false

  - name: key-auth
    route: my_route
    config:
      key_names: "auth_key"

  - name: rate-limiting
    service: my_service
    config:
      second: 5
      hour: 1000
      policy: "local"
  
  - name: rate-limiting
    route: my_route
    config:
      minute: 10
      policy: "local"
